| DC-001 — Document Resource schema + DocumentCollectionState | **Logic** | Unit test — `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_resource_schema_test.gd` + CI grep lint for `tr(`/`atr(` in `document.gd` | None |

| DC-004 — Save/restore contract — capture(), restore(), spawn-gate | **Integration** | Integration test — `tests/integration/feature/document_collection/document_save_restore_test.gd` + unit `document_capture_aliasing_test.gd` + `document_spawn_gate_test.gd` + `document_formula_budget_test.gd` | Smoke check — full save→reload→spawn-gate cycle |

| PPS-003 — Sepia-dim tween state machine — logic against stubbed shader API | **Logic** | Unit test — `tests/unit/foundation/post_process_stack/sepia_dim_state_machine_test.gd` (state transitions + reverse-tween + no-op idempotency) | None (PPS-002 shader stubbed; no visual to verify yet) |
| PPS-005 — WorldEnvironment glow ban + forbidden post-process enforcement | **Logic** | Unit test — `tests/unit/foundation/post_process_stack/glow_ban_enforcement_test.gd` + CI grep lint for `glow_enabled = true` in `src/` + scene-property audit for `bloom_amount`, `ssr_enabled`, `motion_blur_enabled`, `dof_blur_*` | None |
| PPS-006 — Resolution scale subscription + `Viewport.scaling_3d_scale` wiring | **Logic** | Unit test — `tests/unit/foundation/post_process_stack/resolution_scale_subscription_test.gd` + CI grep lint for direct `scaling_3d_scale =` outside PPS/SettingsService | None |
| PPS-007 — Full-stack visual + perf verification | **Visual/Feel** | Performance test — `tests/integration/foundation/post_process_stack/full_chain_perf_test.gd` (Slot 3 budget assertion if measurable headlessly) | **Screenshot evidence** at `production/qa/evidence/post-process-stack/` for AC-1..4 + GPU pass timer in `post-process-stack-perf-evidence.md` for AC-5/6/7 + Vulkan-Windows parity AC-8 — **all visual sign-off DEFERRED to user** per global stop condition #3 |

**Classification rollup**: 8 Logic + 3 Integration + 1 Visual/Feel. Visual/Feel
(PPS-007) carries the only deferred-to-user sign-off; Integration items

## Automated Tests Required

### AUD-003 — Plaza ambient + UNAWARE/COMBAT music + section reverb (Integration)
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/foundation/audio/audio_music_states_test.gd` (signal-driven state transitions)
- `tests/unit/foundation/audio/audio_music_state_grid_test.gd` (player config, dominant-guard dict, reverb in-place mutation)

**What to test**:
- AC-1: 3 `AudioStreamPlayer` children exist (`MusicDiegetic`, `MusicNonDiegetic`, `MusicSting`) all on `bus = &"Music"`; initial volumes match `plaza_calm` (`Diegetic=0.0`, `NonDiegetic=-12.0`).
- AC-2: `section_entered(&"plaza", FORWARD)` → 2.0 s ease-in-out tweens to (`0.0`, `-12.0`); ambient loop player begins playing the Plaza ambient stream.
- AC-3: `alert_state_changed(guard_node, UNAWARE, COMBAT, MAJOR)` → dominant-guard dict updated; `MusicDiegetic` 0.3 s linear tween to `-80.0`; `MusicNonDiegetic` 0.3 s linear tween to `0.0`. *Note: depends on ADR-0002 amendment landing — skip if not yet committed.*
- AC-4: `section_exited(&"plaza", reason)` → dominant-guard dict cleared (size==0) and in-flight Tweens are killed (`Tween.is_valid()==false` post-call).
- AC-5: `section_entered(&"plaza", FORWARD)` → `AudioEffectReverb` instance is mutated in-place (pre/post object identity equal — `pre_ref == post_ref`).
- AC-6: `section_entered(&"plaza", RESPAWN)` → handler early-returns; no music crossfade; ambient player undisturbed.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- ADR-0002 amendment not yet landed → AC-3 test marked `@skip("blocked on ADR-0002 amendment")` — surface to user (stop condition #1)
- Tween already in flight when `section_entered` fires again → assert previous Tween is killed before new Tween scheduled
- Dominant-guard dict with multiple guards at different alert levels → music driven by highest-level

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit + 4 integration tests

---

### AUD-004 — VO ducking F.1 + document mute + respawn cut-to-silence (Logic)
**Test files**:
- `tests/unit/foundation/audio/audio_ducking_formula_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/foundation/audio/audio_respawn_cut_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: Formula F.1 from GDD `audio.md` §Formula 1 — at `plaza_calm` state with Music slider at 0 dB and `dialogue_line_started`, MusicDiegetic Tween target = `max(0.0 + (-14.0), -80.0) = -14.0`; MusicNonDiegetic = `-18.0`; Ambient = `-6.0`. Read Tween targets within 1 frame of emit.
- AC-2: `dialogue_line_finished` → all three layers tween back to pre-duck stored values over 0.5 s.
- AC-3: Mid-attack interruption — start attack tween, advance test clock partway, emit `dialogue_line_finished`, assert release tween starts from LIVE current `volume_db` (not from attack target).
- AC-4: F.1 clamp boundary — Music slider at `-80 dB`, duck target = `max(-80.0 + (-14.0), -80.0) = -80.0` (not `-94.0`).
- AC-5: `document_opened(id)` → MusicDiegetic 0.5 s linear to `-10 dB`; MusicNonDiegetic 0.5 s to `-20 dB`; Voice bus 0.3 s attack to `voice_current_db + (-12.0)` clamped at `-80.0`.
- AC-6: `document_closed(id)` → music + Voice restore over 0.5 s.
- AC-7: `respawn_triggered(&"plaza")` → MusicDiegetic + MusicNonDiegetic instant cut to `-80 dB`; after 200 ms (`respawn_silence_s`), tween to `(0.0, -12.0)` over 2.0 s ease-in-out (`respawn_fade_in_s`); dominant-guard dict cleared.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Multiple `dialogue_line_started` arrivals stacking → release should only fire on the final `dialogue_line_finished` (state-keyed counter or last-wins)
- `respawn_triggered` mid-VO-duck → respawn cut takes priority; pre-duck values discarded
- Voice bus already below `-80.0` → clamp stays at `-80.0`
- F.1 clamp boundary at exactly `-80.0` → edge value stays `-80.0` not `-80.000001`

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests (5 ducking + 3 document-overlay + 2 respawn)

---

### AUD-005 — Footstep variant routing + COMBAT stinger (Logic)
**Test files**:
- `tests/unit/foundation/audio/audio_footstep_variant_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/foundation/audio/audio_stinger_debounce_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/foundation/audio/audio_beat_offset_helper_test.gd` (pure helper)

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `player_footstep(&"marble", 5.0)` → pooled `AudioStreamPlayer3D` plays `sfx_footstep_marble_normal_*` on SFX bus (placeholder `.ogg` acceptable; bus + variant key are the assertion).
- AC-2: `player_footstep(&"marble", 2.0)` → variant key = `soft`; `noise_radius_m == 0.0` → no pool slot consumed.
- AC-3: `player_footstep(&"marble", 12.0)` → variant key = `extreme`.
- AC-4: 16 pool slots full → oldest non-Voice/non-UI slot stolen (no `AudioStreamPlayer3D.new()` runtime alloc).
- AC-5: First `actor_became_alerted(_, SAW_PLAYER, _, MAJOR)` → stinger scheduled at next 120 BPM downbeat (`get_next_beat_offset_s(current_pos, 120.0)`); `_pending_stinger_beat_time` populated.
- AC-6: Second `actor_became_alerted` within 0.5 s → no new stinger (per-beat-window debounce).
- AC-7: `actor_became_alerted(_, SCRIPTED, _, MAJOR)` → no stinger (SCRIPTED-cause suppression).
- AC-8: `actor_became_alerted(_, SAW_PLAYER, _, MINOR)` → no stinger (MAJOR-only filter).
- AC-9 (helper unit test): `get_next_beat_offset_s(pos, 120.0)` for 6 parametrized inputs: `(0.0)→0.0`, `(0.1)→0.4`, `(0.24)→0.26`, `(0.5)→0.0`, `(0.3)→0.2`, `(0.499)→0.001`, ±0.001 s tolerance.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Bucket boundary at exactly `3.5 m` → soft (`≤3.5`) not normal (`>3.5`)
- Bucket boundary at exactly `6.5 m` → normal (`≤6.5`) not loud
- Bucket boundary at exactly `10.0 m` → loud (`≤10.0`) not extreme
- Pool full + only Voice/UI slots free → fail safe (skip play, no exception)
- BPM helper at floating-point edges — `(0.999, 120.0)` near beat boundary

**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests

---

### DC-001 — Document Resource schema + DocumentCollectionState (Logic)
**Test file**: `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_resource_schema_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `class_name Document extends Resource` with exactly 6 exported fields (`id`, `title_key`, `body_key`, `section_id`, `interact_label_key`, `tier_override`); types are `StringName` for first 5 + `int` for `tier_override`. No `tr()`, `atr()`, `String.t()`, `TranslationServer.translate()` strings in the file.
- AC-2: `DocumentCollectionState` has exactly one field `@export var collected: Array[StringName]` defaulting to `[]`. Matches frozen ADR-0003 schema.
- AC-3: `Document.new()` property list inspection — all 6 fields present; defaults: `tier_override = -1`; `interact_label_key = &"ui.interact.read_document"`. No `title`/`body` resolved-string fields.
- AC-4: CI grep with word-boundary anchors (and comment-line exclusion) for `tr(`/`atr(`/`String.t(`/`TranslationServer.translate(` in `document.gd` → 0 matches.
- AC-5: `DocumentCollectionState.new()` default `collected == []`; `ResourceSaver.save()` then `ResourceLoader.load()` round-trips `collected` including `StringName` identity preservation.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `tier_override = -1` vs `0` vs `99` (sentinel default vs valid override range)
- Empty `id` (`StringName(&"")`) — should be tolerated at Resource level; CI lint #1 (DC-002 spec) catches at scene-level
- `collected` containing duplicate StringNames after round-trip — Array[StringName] preserves order

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests

---

### DC-002 — DocumentBody node — collision layer, stencil tier, interact priority (Logic)
**Test file**: `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_body_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `class_name DocumentBody extends StaticBody3D`. `@export var document: Document` exists; `get_interact_priority() -> int` returns `0`. No `_process` or `_physics_process` override.
- AC-2: `collision_layer == PhysicsLayers.MASK_INTERACTABLES` (no other bits); `collision_mask == 0`. CI static-analysis lint asserts no bare integer literals for layer values.
- AC-3: Scene `document_body.tscn` exists; structure: `DocumentBody` (StaticBody3D + script) → `CollisionShape3D` (BoxShape3D `Vector3(0.30, 0.05, 0.20)`) + `MeshInstance3D` (mesh = null in template). Node added to group `&"section_documents"`.
- AC-4: Stencil Tier 1 set via `OutlineTier.set_tier()` or scene-baked material; stencil reference value `1`, ADR-0001 stencil mode + flags. Verified by reading material properties.
- AC-5: Instantiate template → `get_interact_priority() == 0`; `collision_layer == MASK_INTERACTABLES`; `collision_mask == 0`.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `document` export null at instantiation → Resource-level no-error; downstream lint catches
- Scene loaded without `OutlineTier` autoload registered → `set_tier()` fallback or hard-fail
- Two `DocumentBody` instances with overlapping `CollisionShape3D` bounds → DC-005 AC-4 enforces ≥0.15 m separation

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

---

### DC-003 — DocumentCollection subscribe/publish lifecycle + pickup handler (Logic)
**Test files**:
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_collection_lifecycle_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_collection_pickup_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_collection_idempotency_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `_ready()` → `Events.player_interacted.is_connected(_on_player_interacted) == true`; `_exit_tree()` → disconnected without error.
- AC-2: With `DocumentBody(id=&"plaza_logbook")` → `Events.player_interacted.emit(body)` fires → `_collected.has(&"plaza_logbook")`; `Events.document_collected` fires exactly once with that id; `body.call_deferred("queue_free")` scheduled.
- AC-3: Re-emit `player_interacted` for the same body → `document_collected` does NOT re-fire; `_collected.size()` unchanged.
- AC-4: `target = null` → handler returns immediately, no error; non-`DocumentBody` `Node3D` → returns immediately; `DocumentBody.document == null` → `push_warning()` + return.
- AC-5: CI grep `^func\s+_(process|physics_process)\b` in `document_collection.gd` → 0 matches.
- AC-6: CI grep for aggregate query method names (`get_collected_count`, `get_total_count`, `is_complete`, `get_completion_percent`) across full codebase → 0 matches.
- AC-7: Sole-publisher CI lint — `grep -rnE "^[^#]*Events\.document_(collected|opened|closed)\.emit\(" src/` filtered to exclude `/document_collection.gd:` → 0 lines.
- AC-8: Not autoload — `grep "DocumentCollection" project.godot` → 0 matches in `[autoload]` section.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Subscribe twice (e.g., `_ready` reentrant) → `is_connected` guard prevents double-connect
- Disconnect before connect (defensive) → `is_connected` returns false; no spurious disconnect
- `DocumentBody` with valid `Document` but already-`queue_free()`'d → `is_instance_valid()` guard
- Reentrant `_on_player_interacted` during signal emission → idempotency net handles

**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit tests + 4 CI grep lints

---

### DC-004 — Save/restore contract — capture(), restore(), spawn-gate (Integration)
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/feature/document_collection/document_save_restore_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_capture_aliasing_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_spawn_gate_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/document_formula_budget_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `capture()` returns defensive copy — `_collected = [&"plaza_logbook"]` → returned `state.collected == [&"plaza_logbook"]`; subsequent mutation of `_collected` does NOT modify captured state (`_collected.duplicate()`).
- AC-2: `restore(state)` with `state.collected = [&"plaza_logbook", &"lower_clipboard"]` → `_collected` populated; subsequent mutation of `state.collected` does NOT modify `_collected` (`state.collected.duplicate()`).
- AC-3: `restore(null)` → `_collected = []`; no crash (GDD §C.6 null-guard).
- AC-4: Spawn-gate frees collected bodies — `_collected = [&"plaza_logbook", &"plaza_register"]` → `_gate_collected_bodies_in_section()` synchronously frees both bodies in `&"section_documents"` group; bodies absent from scene tree post-call.
- AC-5: Stale id (no matching body) → no crash, no error, no unintended frees.
- AC-6: Spawn-gate iterating body with `document == null` → `push_warning()`, body NOT freed, no crash.
- AC-7: `_open_document_id` not persisted — programmatic set; `capture()` returns state with only `collected`; subsequent `restore(state)` → `_open_document_id == &""` (default).
- AC-8: F.1 budget arithmetic — N=4 subscribers, GDD §F.1 component values → result `0.046 ms ± 0.0005`; `0.046 < 0.05`; headroom `(0.05 - 0.046) / 0.05 ≥ 0.08`.
- AC-9: F.1 with N=6 → result `> 0.05` (confirms ADR-0008 amendment trigger).

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `capture()` immediately after construction (`_collected == []`) → state.collected == []
- `restore()` with state containing duplicate ids → `_collected` carries duplicates (no dedup at restore boundary)
- Spawn-gate during scene transition (mid-`_exit_tree`) → bodies may already be queue_free'd; `is_instance_valid()` guard
- Save manifest version mismatch (forward-compat) → consult SL umbrella; not DC-004's job

**Estimated test count**: ~12 unit + 3 integration tests

---

### DC-005 — Plaza tutorial document set — placement, locale keys, end-to-end (Integration)
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/feature/document_collection/plaza_tutorial_round_trip_test.gd`
- `tests/unit/feature/document_collection/plaza_documents_lint_test.gd` (CI scene-lints)

**What to test**:
- AC-1: 3 `Document.tres` resources exist for Plaza — `plaza_security_logbook_001`, `plaza_tourist_register_001`, `plaza_maintenance_clipboard_001` — each with non-empty `id`, `title_key`, `body_key`, `section_id == &"plaza"`.
- AC-2: Localization CSV (`assets/localization/`) contains `doc.plaza_security_logbook_001.title`, `doc.plaza_tourist_register_001.title`, `doc.plaza_maintenance_clipboard_001.title`, `ui.interact.pocket_document`, `ui.interact.read_document` in default English locale; no key resolves to empty. Body keys deferred to VS (overlay UI).
- AC-3: Plaza section scene — `Section/Systems/DocumentCollection` node + `&"critical_path"` spline + `documents/` Node3D group with 3 `DocumentBody` instances (template-instantiated, `.tres` assigned, positioned per §C.5.3). CI lint AC-DC-1.2/1.3/1.5 pass.
- AC-4: Tourist-register + maintenance-clipboard ≥ 10.0 m from `&"critical_path"` spline (`is_off_path = true`); security-logbook on-path. Bodies ≥ 0.15 m apart and from PICKUP/DOOR volumes.
- AC-5: Round-trip — emit `Events.player_interacted.emit(logbook_body)` → `Events.document_collected` fires once with `&"plaza_security_logbook_001"`; body freed; `dc.capture().collected.has(&"plaza_security_logbook_001") == true`; `SaveGame` save to `user://slot_0.res` + reload → `loaded_save.documents.collected.has(&"plaza_security_logbook_001") == true`; `dc.restore(loaded_save.documents)` → no `DocumentBody` for that id in section.
- AC-6: Save-during-reach — `capture()` BEFORE `player_interacted` emit → restore reinstates body (id absent from `_collected`); player must re-collect.
- AC-7 (smoke check basis): Manual smoke confirms snap-clear pickup (no tween/animation), no UI counter increment, no achievement popup.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- `scenes/sections/plaza.tscn` write-permission still blocked → ship DC-005 as logic-only round-trip (3 `Document.tres` resources + headless `DocumentCollection`); flag in close-out as "live placement deferred" — pattern from Sprint 06 HC-006
- Localization CSV missing one of the 3 title keys → CI locale-key completeness check fails
- Save written by Sprint 06 manifest version 2026-04-30; reload after DC-001 lands → backward-compat preserved (no version bump expected; surface as stop condition #8 if it surfaces)

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit lints + 4 integration tests

---

### PPS-003 — Sepia-dim tween state machine — logic against stubbed shader API (Logic)
**Test file**: `tests/unit/foundation/post_process_stack/sepia_dim_state_machine_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `enable_sepia_dim()` from IDLE → `is_sepia_active = true`; state = `FADING_IN`; Tween tweens `dim_intensity` 0.0 → 1.0; after 0.5 s state = `ACTIVE`, `dim_intensity = 1.0`.
- AC-2: `disable_sepia_dim()` from ACTIVE → state = `FADING_OUT`; Tween tweens 1.0 → 0.0; after 0.5 s state = `IDLE`, `dim_intensity = 0.0`, `is_sepia_active = false`.
- AC-3: Reverse-tween — `disable_sepia_dim()` mid-`FADING_IN` (at t≈0.2 s, `dim_intensity ≈ 0.35`) → active Tween killed; new Tween from current value (≈0.35) toward 0.0, no teleport.
- AC-4: `disable_sepia_dim()` from IDLE → no-op; state stays IDLE, `dim_intensity = 0.0`, no Tween, no error.
- AC-5: `enable_sepia_dim()` from ACTIVE → no-op; no new Tween.
- AC-6: Symmetric reverse — `enable_sepia_dim()` mid-`FADING_OUT` (at t≈0.2 s, `dim_intensity ≈ 0.65`) → active Tween killed; new Tween from current (≈0.65) toward 1.0.
- AC-7: `enable_sepia_dim()` during `FADING_IN` → no-op (in-flight Tween continues uninterrupted toward 1.0).
- **Stubbed-shader contract**: state machine calls a `_sepia_effect.set_dim_intensity(value)` interface; tests substitute a stub effect and assert the call sequence + values, NOT actual shader output. PPS-002 will conform when it lands.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Rapid enable/disable/enable/disable within one frame — only the latest tween should survive; intermediate tweens killed cleanly
- Tween ends exactly at 0.5 s frame boundary → state correctly transitions to `ACTIVE`/`IDLE`
- `dim_intensity` floating-point precision at endpoints (`0.999...` should be treated as `1.0` for state transition)
- GDD Formula 2 smoothstep at normalized time 0.4 → expected ≈0.35 (verify formula matches)

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

---

### PPS-005 — WorldEnvironment glow ban + forbidden post-process enforcement (Logic)
**Test file**: `tests/unit/foundation/post_process_stack/glow_ban_enforcement_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: Debug build — `WorldEnvironment.glow_enabled = true` → `assert(false, "Glow is forbidden per Art Bible 8J ...")` fires; release build — `push_warning()` + force `glow_enabled = false` same-frame.
- AC-2: Project audit — every `WorldEnvironment` (currently plaza stand-in) has `glow_enabled = false`, `bloom_amount == 0`, `ssr_enabled = false`, `motion_blur_enabled = false`, `dof_blur_far_enabled = false`, `dof_blur_near_enabled = false`.
- AC-3: `environment.tonemap_mode == <Godot 4.6 neutral linear constant>`. **Pre-implementation**: verify exact constant name against `docs/engine-reference/godot/modules/rendering.md` 4.6 entry — escalate to godot-shader-specialist if drift surfaces (stop condition #9).
- AC-4: CI grep `glow_enabled = true` in `src/` → 0 matches; `tests/` exception permitted.
- AC-5: Debug build — temporarily set `WorldEnvironment.glow_enabled = true` in test scene → assertion or push_error with text "Glow is forbidden per Art Bible 8J" produced.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- New scene added with default `WorldEnvironment` (glow off by default) → assertion does NOT fire
- Scene loaded mid-game (`SceneTree.node_added` signal hook) → enforcement runs on dynamic load too
- Subclass/derived `WorldEnvironment` resource with overridden glow → enforcement still catches via property check
- `tonemap_mode` constant renamed in 4.6 vs LLM training-data 4.3 → engine-reference lookup gates implementation

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests + 1 CI grep lint + 1 scene-property audit

---

### PPS-006 — Resolution scale subscription + `Viewport.scaling_3d_scale` wiring (Logic)
**Test file**: `tests/unit/foundation/post_process_stack/resolution_scale_subscription_test.gd`

**What to test**:
- AC-1: `_ready()` → `Events.setting_changed` is connected with `is_connected` guard; handler `_on_setting_changed(category, name, value)` exists. `_exit_tree()` → disconnect.
- AC-2: Desktop GPU (RTX 2060 class) profile → `Events.setting_changed.emit(&"graphics", &"resolution_scale", 1.0)` → `get_viewport().scaling_3d_scale == 1.0`.
- AC-3: Iris Xe profile → emit `(&"graphics", &"resolution_scale", 0.75)` → `scaling_3d_scale == 0.75`.
- AC-4: Runtime change — emit new value → `scaling_3d_scale` updated immediately; next-frame render uses new scale (no transition blur).
- AC-5: CI grep for direct `scaling_3d_scale =` outside `src/core/post_process_stack/` and `src/core/settings/` → 0 matches (anti-pattern `direct_viewport_scaling_modification`).
- AC-6: Handler defensive guard — `setting_changed` fires for `(category, name) ≠ (&"graphics", &"resolution_scale")` → handler early-returns; `scaling_3d_scale` untouched.

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Boundary values — `0.5`, `0.75`, `1.0`, `1.5` — all set correctly
- Out-of-range — `0.0` or `2.0` → either clamped by SettingsService upstream OR PPS rejects (define behavior; check GDD)
- `Viewport` not yet ready at handler-fire time → `is_instance_valid(get_viewport())` guard
- Repeated emits with same value → idempotent (no-op or set-anyway, both acceptable)

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests + 1 CI grep lint

---

### PPS-007 — Full-stack visual + perf verification (Visual/Feel)
**Test files**:
- `tests/integration/foundation/post_process_stack/full_chain_perf_test.gd` (automated portions only — Slot 3 budget assertion if measurable in headless mode; otherwise skipped with `@skip("requires GPU profile")`)

**What to test (automated)**:
- AC-7 (partial — automatable): When `_sepia_state == IDLE`, the CompositorEffect call is short-circuited (verify call-count instrumentation = 0 vs ≥1 when ACTIVE).
- Vulkan rendering driver active (`OS.get_video_adapter_name()` / `RenderingServer.get_rendering_method()` reads "forward_plus" + Vulkan).

**What requires manual + visual sign-off** (DEFERRED to user per global stop condition #3):
- AC-1: Plaza scene full chain renders without shader compile errors, Z-order glitches, color space artifacts. Screenshot at `production/qa/evidence/post-process-stack/full-chain-vulkan-linux.png`.
- AC-2: With `glow_enabled = false`, no bloom halo around emissive plaza street lamps. Screenshot with explicit emissive material.
- AC-3: Sepia ACTIVE + Document Overlay stub at `CanvasLayer` index 20 → world warm-sepia ~30% luminance; card at full saturation (no sepia tint).
- AC-4: `resolution_scale = 0.75` + outline + sepia → both passes scale correctly, no fixed-pixel artifacts, no full-res bleed.
- AC-5: Sepia dim pass GPU timer ≤ 0.5 ms (target ≤ 0.3 ms per GDD AC-18) on RTX 2060 1080p native; record in `production/qa/evidence/post-process-stack-perf-evidence.md`.
- AC-6: Full chain (outline + sepia + scale) ≤ 2.5 ms on Iris Xe (or RTX 2060 with scaling proxy); ADR-0008 Slot 3 cap; advisory until ADR-0008 fully Accepted; record evidence.
- AC-8: Vulkan-Windows parity — same screenshots + perf profile as Vulkan-Linux.

**Edge cases (visual)**:
- Sepia at intermediate value (0.5 dim_intensity) → smooth interpolation between full-color and full-sepia
- Outline + sepia interaction at scaled resolution — outline pixel width should NOT change with scale (constant-pixel pass)
- HDR clipping test — emissive material at intensity > 1.0 — no white-out under sepia tint

**Estimated test count**: 1 automated + 8 manual screenshot/perf items

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### AUD-003 — Plaza ambient + UNAWARE/COMBAT music + section reverb (Integration)
**Verification method**: Smoke check (manual ear-test acceptable; audio-director may sub spec-compliance review)
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer (smoke) + audio-director (spec compliance review)
**Evidence to capture**: brief audio recording or designer notes confirming (1) ambient plays on Plaza load, (2) audible 0.3 s linear crossfade to COMBAT music on first guard alert, (3) no audible click during reverb in-place mutation.

Checklist:
- [ ] Plaza loads → ambient music plays within 1 s
- [ ] First guard escalates to COMBAT → music crossfades to combat track within ~0.3 s
- [ ] Section reverb audibly changes when entering Plaza (no click)
- [ ] Respawn re-entry does NOT re-trigger music crossfade (handled by AUD-004)

*If alert-tier music asset is a placeholder one-shot per stop condition #4, manual QA confirms placeholder plays without crash and notes "asset commission required" in evidence.*

---

### DC-004 — Save/restore contract (Integration)
**Verification method**: Manual step-through during smoke check
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: short notes in `production/qa/evidence/document_collection/save_restore_smoke.md` confirming round-trip behaviour.

Checklist:
- [ ] Plaza loaded → 3 documents present in scene
- [ ] Collect security logbook → body disappears immediately
- [ ] Save game (manual)
- [ ] Reload save → security logbook NOT present in scene; tourist register + maintenance clipboard still present
- [ ] No console errors during save or restore

---

### DC-005 — Plaza tutorial document set — end-to-end (Integration)
**Verification method**: Smoke check / playtest sub-segment (Plaza walk-through)
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer + (optional) game-designer for player-facing flow
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/document_collection/plaza_tutorial_smoke.md`.

Checklist:
- [ ] Walk to security logbook → interact prompt shows `tr("ui.interact.read_document")` (or `pocket_document` per GDD)
- [ ] Interact → body disappears snap-clear (no fade, no animation)
- [ ] No UI counter increments anywhere on screen
- [ ] No achievement popup fires
- [ ] Tourist register + maintenance clipboard remain in section
- [ ] Save → reload → snapshot persists

*If `scenes/sections/` write-permission constraint persists, this checklist is **deferred** with note "live placement blocked; logic-only verification ran via integration test"; Sprint 07 close-out flags follow-up to user.*

---

### PPS-007 — Full-stack visual + perf verification (Visual/Feel)
**Verification method**: **Screenshot diff + designer/lead sign-off** — **deferred to user** per global stop condition #3
**Who must sign off**: technical-artist + creative-director (or user-as-creative-director per studio scale)
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/post-process-stack/` directory containing:
- `full-chain-vulkan-linux.png` (AC-1)
- `glow-ban-emissive-no-bloom.png` (AC-2)
- `sepia-active-with-overlay-stub.png` (AC-3)
- `resolution-scale-075.png` (AC-4)
- `post-process-stack-perf-evidence.md` (AC-5/6/7 GPU pass timer measurements)
- `full-chain-vulkan-windows.png` (AC-8)

Checklist:
- [ ] AC-1 screenshot — no shader compile errors, no Z-order glitches, no banding
- [ ] AC-2 screenshot — emissive material with `glow_enabled=false` shows no bloom halo
- [ ] AC-3 screenshot — sepia ACTIVE + overlay stub shows world ~30% luminance warm-sepia, card full saturation
- [ ] AC-4 screenshot — outline + sepia at `resolution_scale=0.75` show correct scaling, no artifacts
- [ ] AC-5 GPU timer — sepia dim pass alone ≤ 0.5 ms on RTX 2060 1080p
- [ ] AC-6 GPU timer — full chain ≤ 2.5 ms (advisory until ADR-0008 Accepted)
- [ ] AC-7 — IDLE state pass cost effectively 0 ms vs outline-only frame
- [ ] AC-8 — Vulkan-Windows screenshot parity with Vulkan-Linux

*PPS-007 is the only sprint story that requires user sign-off. It does NOT block the sprint close (logic stories already verified). Surfacing screenshots to user is part of the close-out section.*

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. **Game launches to main menu without crash** (Sprint 06 baseline preserved)
2. **New game can be started** (Sprint 06 baseline preserved)
3. **Plaza ambient music plays on level load** (AUD-003 smoke)
4. **Guard escalates to COMBAT → audible music crossfade** (AUD-003 + AUD-005 stinger combined)
5. **VO line plays → music + ambient duck audibly** (AUD-004 — placeholder VO clip if D&S not yet shipping VO)
6. **Document pickup — body disappears snap-clear, `document_collected` fires** (DC-003 + DC-005)
7. **Save → reload — collected documents NOT present in section** (DC-004 + DC-005)
8. **Player death → music cuts to silence, fades back in over 2 s on respawn** (AUD-004 respawn cut)
9. **Resolution scale toggled in Settings → next frame renders at new scale** (PPS-006)
10. **Glow ban active — no scene has `glow_enabled = true`** (PPS-005 lint pass)
11. **Performance — frame time within 16.6 ms budget on Plaza VS scene** (PPS-007 advisory; ADR-0008 Slot 3 ≤ 2.5 ms)
12. **Cumulative test suite green** — Sprint 06 baseline ~1033 tests + Sprint 07 additions; pre-existing 12 known flakies acceptable; zero new failures

*Smoke tests are verified by the developer via `/smoke-check sprint`. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|---------------|--------------|-------------------|
| DC-005 (Plaza tutorial) | Does the patient observer's-reward loop *feel* rewarding without UI counter feedback? Does the snap-clear pickup read as intentional or as a missing animation? | 1 | New player (5–15 min Plaza walk-through) |
| AUD-003 + AUD-005 combined | Does the music + stinger combination read as "alert" rather than "soundtrack accident"? Does the COMBAT music wear out at 60 s+ exposure? | 1 | New player (combat-loop tester) |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to
`production/session-logs/playtest-sprint07-[story-slug].md` and reviewed by
the game-designer before the sprint can be marked CLOSED. *Playtests are
**advisory** — the sprint may close without them if the user prefers to wait
for the post-VS soak-test phase. Surface to user if any tester raises an S1/S2
issue during play.*

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (8 + 3 = 11 stories)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for PPS-007 (1 story); user sign-off on screenshots may be deferred per stop condition #3
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint`) — 12 critical-path items above
- [ ] No regressions introduced (full suite green ignoring 12 pre-existing Sprint 05 flakies)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` per story)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] Forbidden-pattern fences registered as listed in `production/sprints/sprint-07-audio-body-and-document-logic.md`
- [ ] Tech-debt register ≤ 12 items at sprint close (currently 8; budget ≤ 4 new TD items)
